bugs.summary: The patch makes workflow spec defaults override explicit runtime model defaults.
bugs.impact: /workflow run --model and workflow_run runtime defaults no longer reliably pin launched subagents when a workflow spec already declares defaults.model.
acceptableFixes: Add a regression test proving /workflow run --model overrides workflow defaults.model.

mustAvoidClaims: Using prior A/B run notes as evidence.
Relying on git history instead of the sanitized workspace and proposed patch.
Assuming every holdout task contains a seeded bug.

difficulty.rationale: The diff looks like harmless precedence cleanup but breaks explicit /workflow run --model overrides.

approvedBy: repro.sh RED/GREEN or no-op revert check
approval.notes: Local blind holdout locked before calibration runs; provider review pending before promotion to primary release gate.
